title: Resolve vacuum-current condition: JV2: J_V scalar residue
description: Sector: J_V residue. Allowed condition: C_JV = 0 outside, or residue is strictly non-metric/diagnostic and has no A-flux effect. Forbidden condition: phi_JV = C_JV/r with C_JV != 0 behaves as exterior scalar charge. Consequence: J_V must not leave a hidden 1/r scalar tail..
